traits.name: Nimble Escape
traits.desc: The goblin can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The aarakocra makes two Wind Staff attacks, and it can use Spellcasting to cast Gust of Wind.

actions.name: Wind Staff
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 11 (2d10) Lightning damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: The aarakocra casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13): At Will: Elementalism, Gust of Wind, Mage Hand, Message. 1/Day: Lightning Bolt.

reactions.name: Feather Fall (1/Day)
reactions.desc: The aarakocra casts Feather Fall in response to that spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

name: Ancient Red Dragon
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 120 ft., Passive Perception 26

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Fire Aura
traits.desc: At the start of each of the dragon's turns, each creature within 10 feet of it takes 10 (3d6) fire damage, and flammable objects in the aura that aren't being worn or carried ignite.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (2d10 + 10) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) fire damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d6 + 10) slashing damage.

actions.name: Tail
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d8 + 10) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Frightful Presence
actions.desc: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 21 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute.

actions.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5–6)
actions.desc: The dragon exhales fire in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 24 Dexterity saving throw, taking 91 (26d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

legendary_actions.name: Detect
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.

legendary_actions.name: Tail Attack
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon makes a tail attack.

legendary_actions.name: Wing Attack (Costs 2 Actions)
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 15 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 25 Dexterity saving throw or take 17 (2d6 + 10) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone.

lair_actions.name: Volcanic Tremor
lair_actions.desc: Volcanic gases form a cloud in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point the dragon can see within 120 feet. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is lightly obscured. It lasts until the dragon uses this action again or until the dragon dies.

lair_actions.name: Magma Eruption
lair_actions.desc: Magma erupts from a point on the ground the dragon can see within 120 feet of it. Each creature within 20 feet of that point must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 21 (6d6) fire damage and be knocked prone.
